Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./public/products-internal.json'\); const product = data.find\(p => p.modelNumber === '1106843'\); if \(product\) { console.log\('✅ 找到產品:'\); console.log\('  ID:', product.id\); console.log\('  型號:', product.modelNumber\); console.log\('  名稱:', product.name\); console.log\('  顏色:', JSON.stringify\(product.colors\)\); } else { console.log\('❌ 找不到型號 1106843'\); console.log\('\\n相近的型號:'\); data.filter\(p => p.modelNumber.includes\('1106'\)\).forEach\(p => console.log\('  -', p.modelNumber, p.name.substring\(0, 40\)\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./public/products.json'\); console.log\('現有 products.json:'\); console.log\('  總產品數:', data.length\); console.log\('\\n型號範圍:'\); const models = data.map\(p => parseInt\(p.modelNumber\)\); console.log\('  最小型號:', Math.min\(...models\)\); console.log\('  最大型號:', Math.max\(...models\)\); console.log\('\\n類別分布:'\); const categories = {}; data.forEach\(p => { categories[p.category] = \(categories[p.category] || 0\) + 1; }\); Object.entries\(categories\).slice\(0, 10\).forEach\(\([cat, count]\) => console.log\('  - ' + cat + ': ' + count\)\);")
